pageContext.name: Raphtalia (Childhood Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and B'full are excited to present the Raphtalia (Childhood Version) Collectible Figure!  From Season 2 of the anime The Rising of the Shield Hero, Raphtalia appears in her child form due to her level drop. Still wearing the adult Raphtalia's clothing, she seems surprised to find herself so small. The slave crest branded on her chest can be seen through the opening of her now-too-big shirt.  Don't miss your chance to add this collectible figure to your collection today!
